title: Lead Instructional Designer at Delhi University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Delhi University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
